prices.source_block:
Admission

Adult (age 15-64): $15
Youth (age 6-14): $5
Senior 65+: $13
Child (age 5 and under): Free
Active Military: Free
Plan on staying 60-90 minutes. Please note admission closes half an hour prior to posted museum closing time.
